_comment: Copy this file to connections.json (git-ignored) and fill in real values. NEVER commit connections.json.

estock_source._role: READ-ONLY source to mirror during transition. ProCare NEVER writes here.
estock_source._store_branch_map: Maps eStock store_id -> ProCare branch code. Missing codes are auto-created on first sync. On the live Elsanta server store 1 = the pharmacy and store 2 = the expired-items depot; both fold into the single ELSANTA branch (Procare has only two pharmacies: Elsanta + Mas-hala).

_estock_sources: Multi-branch: one entry PER branch server, each with its own store_branch_map. When present this list replaces estock_source for the continuous sync; every source refreshes only its own branches in the one ProCare database.

titan_drugeye_source._role: READ-ONLY clinical source: product names + drug substitution/interactions.

procare_database._role: ProCare OS OWN database — the new system of record. Read/write.

programs.estock_app_path: TBD_(confirm install path of eStock app)

notifications._manager_phone: Manager WhatsApp for operational alerts (transfer requests, daily report, expiry/reorder). Egyptian 01xxxxxxxxx is fine. Or set env MANAGER_PHONE. Needs WHATSAPP_TOKEN + WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID to actually send.

ai._providers: anthropic | gemini | ollama (local, no key; 'hermes' is an alias) | claude-cli (local Claude Code, no key). Gemini Pro = set model gemini-2.5-pro.
ai._base_url: For provider=ollama only; the local server. Override with AI_BASE_URL / OLLAMA_BASE_URL.
